name: oil-tycoon-monorepo
description: Monorepo for the 2.5D multiplayer oil tycoon: Cocos client, Node WebSocket server, and shared protocol/types.

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @oiltycoon/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @oiltycoon/server
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @oiltycoon/shared && npm run build --workspace @oiltycoon/server
